name: @freeside-worlds/config-protocol
description: Effect.Schema surface-config protocol for world surface-config (runtime-editable per-surface config, keyed by world_slug+surface). The Effect.Schema in surface-config.ts is the contract; TS types are derived via Schema.Schema.Type. Jani's sietch Theme model ported faithfully. C-1 extraction. Decode-and-validate at the service boundary, mirroring the cluster's @effect/schema convention (freeside-auth packages/protocol).
